# AIPromptIndex.io
> https://aipromptindex.io

## What is this site?
AIPromptIndex.io is a curated AI prompt directory for entrepreneurs and creators. It provides ready-to-use, copy-paste prompts for popular AI tools.

## Content types
- **Prompts**: Curated AI prompts with descriptions, variables, tips, and example outputs
- **Tools**: AI tools the prompts are designed for (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Midjourney, DALL-E, Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Stable Diffusion)
- **Categories**: Use-case groupings (Writing, Coding, Marketing, Image Generation, Business, Data Analysis, Education, Creative)

## URL patterns
- Prompts: /prompts/{slug}/
- Tools: /tools/{slug}/
- Categories: /categories/{slug}/
- Blog: /blog/{slug}/
- Guides: /guides/{slug}/

## Scale
- 64+ curated prompts across 8 categories and 8 AI tools
- Each prompt includes: title, description, prompt text, variables, tips, difficulty level, and example output

## Machine-readable feeds and endpoints
- RSS feed: /rss.xml
- Search index (JSON): /search-index.json
- Sitemap: /sitemap.xml

## Related sites
- AIToolIndex.io — curated directory of 200+ AI tools
